CustomField.description: Formula field. Concatenates Mailing Street, Street2, City, State, Postal Code, and Country into a single formatted address block.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The full mailing address, assembled from the individual address fields on this record.
CustomField.formula: MailingStreet__c & BR() & MailingStreet2__c & IF(ISBLANK(MailingStreet2__c), "", BR()) & MailingCity__c & IF(ISBLANK(MailingCity__c), "", ", ") & MailingState__c & " " & MailingPostalCode__c & IF(ISBLANK(MailingCountry__c), "", BR() & MailingCOuntry__c)
CustomField.label: Mailing Address
